summary: Updated ARCHITECTURE.md: expanded runtime/sense.js API with full wake word pipeline functions (init/on/detect/start/stop/initHeadless/startHeadless/detectFrame/startWakeWordPipeline/stopWakeWordPipeline), added section 11 Runtime Adapters documenting sense.js adapter, embed.js stub, and all 7 voice adapters, expanded profiler.js with measurePipeline(), fixed latency-log.js exports to match actual API (record/p95/reset), added sox.js and download-state.js to CLI section. Updated codebase-map.md known issues with resolved #agentic-voice import map and latest status. Architecture now at 494 lines with 11 formal module sections covering all source files.
